checklist.name: Generate files API
checklist.description: Uses generateFiles() from @nx/devkit with proper parameters

checklist.name: Name transformations
checklist.description: Template variables include names() transformations (className, propertyName, fileName)

checklist.name: Template extension stripping
checklist.description: Template variables include tmpl: '' to strip .template extension

checklist.name: Dynamic file naming
checklist.description: Template files use __fileName__ token for dynamic file naming

checklist.name: EJS syntax
checklist.description: Templates use EJS syntax for variable substitution (<%= variableName %>)

checklist.name: Documentation
checklist.description: TEMPLATE-GUIDE.md explains name transformations and file token replacement
